'''''Star Wars'' 14''' is the fourteenth issue in the ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' series of comics. It was published on [[January 26]], [[2000]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Half of the Jedi Council has been sent to the world of Malastare - one of the last worlds to hold Podraces - to negotiate a peace treaty between two warring factions. But the whole affair is being manipulated by a secret, third party, out to assassinate the Jedi! This story arc features many familiar characters from ''The Phantom Menace''. Witness the ongoing adventures that bridge the gap between Episodes I & II!''

==Plot summary==
As the [[Phoebos Memorial Run/Legends|Phoebos Memorial Run]] draws to a close with [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] as winner, Senator [[Aks Moe/Legends|Aks Moe]], the [[Red Iaro/Legends|Red Iaro]] leader and a [[Order of the Ffib|Ffib]] priest discuss a conspiracy to assassinate the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] leaders. Shortly after the Jedi arrive. On the way to their quarters, they realize they are being watched. [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] and [[Even Piell/Legends|Even Piell]] decide to stay behind and are promptly, attacked by the Ffib priest and the terrorist. When more Jedi arrive, the pair flee.
